description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, slim profile and rounded corners. The front features a large, dark glass touchscreen that occupies nearly the entire surface, with a small cutout at the top for sensors or a front-facing camera. The back is also dark, with two small circular camera lenses and a flash positioned in the upper left corner, and a subtle circular indentation in the center, possibly for a fingerprint sensor. The sides are thin and appear to be made of a matte or semi-glossy plastic or metal, with visible buttons on the right edge. The overall design is minimalist and functional, typical of contemporary mobile phones used in urban environments. The device appears to be solidly constructed, with no visible branding or decorative elements.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist design. The device features a slim profile and subtle side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large, black glass touchscreen with a small cutout at the top for sensors or a camera.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the slim profile and the presence of side buttons, likely for power and volume control.
description_view_2: Back view displays two small camera lenses and a flash in the upper left corner, along with a central circular indentation.
description_view_3: Left side view shows the thin edge of the phone with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank or turned off, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker.
